channel.title: Reviews in Inorganic Chemistry
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Reviews in Inorganic Chemistry

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Khalida Naseem, Asad Aziz, Mohammad Ehtisham Khan, Shahzaib Ali, Awais Khalid DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/revic-2025-frontmatter1

item.title: A review of coordination compounds: structure, stability, and biological significance
item.description: Article by Khalida Naseem, Asad Aziz, Mohammad Ehtisham Khan, Shahzaib Ali, Awais Khalid DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/revic-2024-0035

item.title: Effluent wastewater technologies for textile industry: a review
item.description: Article by Khalida Naseem, Asad Aziz, Mohammad Ehtisham Khan, Shahzaib Ali, Awais Khalid DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/revic-2024-0046

item.title: Efficient removal of Cr(VI) ions from industrial wastewater using carbon-based adsorbents functionalized with boronic acid
item.description: Article by Khalida Naseem, Asad Aziz, Mohammad Ehtisham Khan, Shahzaib Ali, Awais Khalid DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/revic-2024-0051

item.title: Exploring inorganic phosphors: basics, types, fabrications and their luminescence properties for LED/WLED/displays
item.description: Article by Khalida Naseem, Asad Aziz, Mohammad Ehtisham Khan, Shahzaib Ali, Awais Khalid DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/revic-2024-0044

item.title: Recent advances on hydrogen generation based on inorganic metal oxide nano-catalyst using water electrolysis approach
item.description: Article by Khalida Naseem, Asad Aziz, Mohammad Ehtisham Khan, Shahzaib Ali, Awais Khalid DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/revic-2024-0026

item.title: Antituberculosis, antimicrobial, antioxidant, cytotoxicity and anti-inflammatory activity of Schiff base derived from 2,3-diaminophenazine moiety and its metal(II) complexes: structural elucidation, computational aspects, and biological evaluation
item.description: Article by Khalida Naseem, Asad Aziz, Mohammad Ehtisham Khan, Shahzaib Ali, Awais Khalid DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/revic-2024-0007

item.title: Carbon-based nanomaterials: synthesis, types and fuel applications: a mini-review
item.description: Article by Khalida Naseem, Asad Aziz, Mohammad Ehtisham Khan, Shahzaib Ali, Awais Khalid DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/revic-2024-0017

item.title: Recent advances in carbon quantum dots for antibiotics detection
item.description: Article by Khalida Naseem, Asad Aziz, Mohammad Ehtisham Khan, Shahzaib Ali, Awais Khalid DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/revic-2024-0025

item.title: Modern innovations in the provision and efficient application of 2D inorganic nanoscale materials
item.description: Article by Khalida Naseem, Asad Aziz, Mohammad Ehtisham Khan, Shahzaib Ali, Awais Khalid DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/revic-2023-0036

item.title: Bioinorganic metal nanoparticles and their potential applications as antimicrobial, antioxidant and catalytic agents: a review
item.description: Article by Khalida Naseem, Asad Aziz, Mohammad Ehtisham Khan, Shahzaib Ali, Awais Khalid DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/revic-2023-0040
